column1: ## SECRETS MISSING IN REPO (Found in Cluster but not in Repo)
## SECRETS MISSING IN CLUSTER (Found in Repo but not in Cluster)

column3: repoUsageCount (how many times the secret is referenced in the repo)
column4: clusterUsageCount (how many times the secret is referenced in the cluster)
column5: newInClusterCount (new references in cluster that are not in the repo)
column6: missingFromClusterCount (references in the repo that are not in the cluster)
